screening_window: South Rae / Hearne margin south of MacKay
dominant_model: Orogenic Au in shears, quartz-carbonate veins, mafic volcanic/BIF-gneiss contacts
claim_gap_interpretation: Best first-pass claim-gap window: meaningful Au till signal and many gold showings with lower active tenure pressure than Yellowknife and East Slave; exact open ground must be verified against live tenure polygons.

dominant_model: Orogenic Au and shear-hosted quartz veins in greenstone slivers; possible BIF/volcanic contacts
claim_gap_interpretation: Strongest till Au anomaly window, but high leases/claims, partly diamond-related; search for legal gaps on margins and up-ice of Au anomalies.

dominant_model: Orogenic Au in greenstone belts; Colomac mafic sill Au; BIF/iron-formation and shear-hosted Au
claim_gap_interpretation: High endowment and drill validation; target second-order structures and inter-project gaps, not known project cores.

dominant_model: High-grade orogenic Au on Campbell/Giant/Con shear systems
claim_gap_interpretation: Best geological analog and infrastructure, but heavy tenure, legacy mine and land-use constraints make broad unclaimed land less likely.
Potentially underexplored for polymetallic Au, but pure-gold evidence is thinner and prospecting permits are present.
Selective Au-W-Cu targets only; not a first-choice NWT gold claim-gap region from this evidence pass.
